allow: PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI", "$env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName\) 2>&1)
PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI\\gh.exe"; Test-Path "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; where.exe gh 2>&1)

PowerShell($base = "D:\\Work\\invoice-starter\\.claude\\worktrees"; foreach \($d in @\("dazzling-jackson-ef9698","keen-shamir-800842","peaceful-goldwasser-2242e3"\)\) { $p = Join-Path $base $d; if \(Test-Path $p\) { try { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "removed $d" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED $d : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Output "already gone: $d" } }; Write-Output "--- remaining ---"; if \(Test-Path $base\) { Get-ChildItem -Force $base | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { Write-Output "\(worktrees dir gone\)" })

PowerShell($target = "D:\\Work\\invoice-starter\\.claude\\worktrees\\keen-shamir-800842"; $empty = Join-Path $env:TEMP \("empty_" + [System.Guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\("N"\)\); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $empty -Force | Out-Null; robocopy $empty $target /MIR /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS /NP | Out-Null; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $target -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $empty -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path $target\) { Write-Output "STILL PRESENT" } else { Write-Output "removed keen-shamir-800842" }; $base = "D:\\Work\\invoice-starter\\.claude\\worktrees"; Write-Output "--- worktrees dir now ---"; if \(Test-Path $base\) { $items = Get-ChildItem -Force $base; if \($items\) { $items | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { Write-Output "\(empty\)" } } else { Write-Output "\(gone\)" })
